title: Even and Odd Components of a Signal
summary: This page covers properties of even and odd functions, specifically their integrals over symmetric intervals, showing that the integral of an even function over [-a,a] equals twice the integral over [0,a], while the integral of an odd function over [-a,a] equals zero. It then introduces the decomposition of any signal into its even and odd components using the formula x(t) = (1/2)[x(t)+x(-t)] + (1/2)[x(t)-x(-t)]. An example demonstrates finding and sketching the even and odd components of the exponential signal x(t) = e^(-at)u(t).
